title: SMRT Eidan 9000 C151 [MTR4]
description: A re-textured Eidan 9000 series, donning the Singapore MRT (SMRT) C151 "Blackbird" livery!
body:
**A re-textured Eidan 9000 series, donning the Singapore MRT (SMRT) C151 "Blackbird" livery!**

(Re-textured by AbsurdlySmrt)

Thanks for downloading my resource pack! Feel free to contact me for more details/improvement! Appreciate it! ~ AbsurdlySmrt

![A re-textured Eidan 9000 series with the C151 "Blackbird" livery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hyBIxiTg/images/8188248e7dbadfae43c33b34c81803f36e4705be.png)

CONTENT:
=========================
A re-texture of the Eidan 9000 series.

REQUIRED MINECRAFT MOD:
=========================
This Resource Pack **requires** the following:

[**Minecraft Transit Railway**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)
*Tested and worked on MTR4. May not work for MTR3.2.2. or below
